channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Vivek Shanbhag on language, translation, and the ethics of writing across tongues
item.description: This article presents an excerpted conversation with Kannada writer Vivek Shanbhag, focusing on his reflections on literature, language, taste, and translation. Shanbhag discusses how writing is shape...

item.title: Wives of detained military officers appeal to President Tinubu for fair and transparent trial process
item.description: Wives of military officers who are currently being held over allegations connected to an alleged coup plot have written to President Bola Ahmed Tinubu, begging for fairness, transparency, and justice ...

item.title: Russia carries out large-scale missile and drone assault on Kyiv amid escalating Ukraine war
item.description: The Independent’s live coverage reports a major escalation in the Ukraine–Russia conflict following a large-scale Russian strike on Kyiv and other Ukrainian regions. According to Ukrainian authorities...

item.title: PSX starts shortened week strongly as KSE-100 surges 2,800 points in early trading
item.description: The Pakistan Stock Exchange (PSX) began the shortened trading week on a strong bullish note on Monday, with the benchmark KSE-100 index witnessing significant early gains. During the initial trading s...

item.title: Vintage Photos Highlight Elizabeth Taylor During the Filming of Rhapsody (1954)
item.description: The article revisits the 1954 Hollywood melodrama 'Rhapsody,' directed by Charles Vidor and starring Elizabeth Taylor during one of the most celebrated periods of her career. Set in the world of elite...

item.title: Arsenal Youngsters Missed Medals During Trophy Ceremony Due to Premier League Appearance Rules
item.description: Arsenal officially received their Premier League trophy and medals after their match against Crystal Palace on May 24, following a successful season under manager Mikel Arteta. During the celebrations...

item.title: Mark Carroll says Queensland should have included Reece Walsh in State of Origin squad
item.description: In this opinion piece, former rugby league player Mark ‘Spudd’ Carroll argues that Queensland made a significant mistake by leaving Reece Walsh out of their squad for the State of Origin series opener...

item.title: Essential financial steps to prepare for a home loan application
item.description: This article outlines practical steps prospective South African homebuyers can take to strengthen their financial position before applying for a home loan. It explains that while lower interest rates ...

item.title: Canonical to Retire Ubuntu Pastebin Service by End of May 2026
item.description: Canonical has announced that it will shut down the Ubuntu Pastebin service, known as paste.ubuntu.com, at the end of May 2026 as part of a broader infrastructure modernization effort. The announcement...

item.title: Aurum secures environmental approvals for 3.22Moz Boundiali gold project in Côte d’Ivoire
item.description: Aurum Resources has achieved a significant regulatory milestone in advancing its Boundiali gold project in Côte d’Ivoire, West Africa, after receiving three Environmental and Social Impact Assessment ...

item.title: Concerns Raised Over Senate Leadership Under Alan Peter Cayetano
item.description: The opinion piece reflects on the controversial ascension of Senator Alan Peter Cayetano to the Senate presidency and the resulting political tension within the chamber. Drawing parallels to his earli...

item.title: PSX surges as KSE-100 gains nearly 2,900 points amid improved global sentiment
item.description: The Pakistan Stock Exchange (PSX) began the new trading week on a strong bullish note on Monday, with the benchmark KSE-100 index witnessing a sharp intraday rise of around 2,800 points. By 9:39am, th...

item.title: Audio Industry Executives Highlight the Growing Importance of the Philippine Market
item.description: The article discusses why the Philippine market is gaining importance for executives in the audio equipment industry. It focuses on how the country has become a relevant space for brands and companies...

item.title: Makueni student impresses crowd with viral impersonation of President William Ruto
item.description: A video from Limuru Girls High School has gone viral in Kenya showing a talented student from Makueni High School delivering a striking impersonation of President William Ruto during a school talent e...

item.title: Ontario Liberal arbitration panel upholds Scarborough Southwest nomination result after appeal by Nate Erskine-Smith
item.description: A complaint filed by federal Liberal MP Nate Erskine-Smith over the Ontario Liberal nomination contest in Scarborough-Southwest has been dismissed by a party arbitration committee. Erskine-Smith had n...

item.title: The Doors Perform ‘Hello, I Love You’ on German TV Show Filmed in Frankfurt’s Römerberg (1968)
item.description: On September 13, 1968, during their first and only European tour, The Doors recorded a televised performance for the German music program “4-3-2-1 Hot & Sweet,” part of the “Musik Für Junge Leute” ser...

item.title: Rising U.S. Treasury Yields Pressure Washington Amid Inflation, War Concerns, and Policy Debate
item.description: U.S. financial markets are facing renewed pressure as Treasury yields rise sharply, testing Washington’s ability to manage higher borrowing costs amid geopolitical tensions and domestic economic uncer...

item.title: Lokayukta directs Belagavi City Corporation members to disclose pending asset declarations
item.description: The Lokayukta has directed elected members of the Belagavi City Corporation to submit their pending asset declarations, reinforcing the mandatory requirement of transparency in public office. Accordin...

item.title: Researchers Identify Liver Protein HELZ2 That Regulates Blood Cholesterol Production
item.description: Researchers at UT Southwestern Medical Center have identified a previously unknown regulatory protein in the liver, called HELZ2, that plays a central role in controlling how much cholesterol is relea...

item.title: West Bengal Government Plans Holding Centres for Suspected Illegal Immigrants Pending Deportation
item.description: The West Bengal government led by Suvendu Adhikari has started implementing its election promise to act against illegal immigration by adopting a “detect, delete and deport” policy. As part of this mo...
